name: Check Cashing Cely's Casa de Cambio
description_short: Check Cashing Cely's Casa de Cambio offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services in Durham, NC with extended hours and bilingual service.
description_long:
Cely's Casa de Cambio is a check-cashing and money services business located at 3411 University Drive in Durham, North Carolina. The company operates as a traditional financial services provider for consumers who need alternatives to traditional banking for basic transaction services. Based on the Waze business listing, the company maintains a physical storefront location and serves the Durham community with direct in-person services.

The company offers core check-cashing services along with complementary financial transaction services. Their service menu includes check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment processing. These services are designed to serve customers who may prefer or require non-bank financial services, including unbanked or underbanked populations. The business name "Casa de Cambio" (money exchange house in Spanish) suggests a focus on serving Spanish-speaking communities and those needing currency exchange services.

Cely's Casa de Cambio distinguishes itself through extended operating hours that exceed typical banking hours. The business is open early mornings (as early as 9:00 AM) and stays open late into the evening (until 9:00 PM most weekdays and Saturdays), including Sunday hours. This accessibility is particularly valuable for working consumers who cannot visit traditional banks during standard business hours. The company maintains a dedicated phone line and website for customer inquiries, indicating professional business operations.

Customers should understand that check-cashing services typically charge fees that are higher than bank accounts but provide immediate access to funds without requiring account maintenance or credit checks. The company's specific fee structures, maximum check amounts, and identification requirements are not disclosed in the available listing information, so customers should contact them directly before using their services. Like all non-bank check-cashing providers, Cely's Casa de Cambio serves a practical function for transaction processing but should not be viewed as a substitute for establishing banking relationships for savings, credit building, or long-term financial management.
pros: Extended operating hours until 9:00 PM most weekdays and Saturdays for working professionals
Open on Sundays (9:00 AM - 7:00 PM) when most banks are closed
Offers multiple complementary services (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) in one location
Spanish-language business name and likely bilingual staff serving Durham's diverse community
Direct phone contact line (919) 402-9173 available for customer service
Established local business with dedicated website (celyscasadecambio.com)
Early opening times (9:00 AM) for customers who need quick morning service
cons: No pricing or fee information disclosed on listing; customers must call to learn costs
No details on maximum check amounts, acceptable check types, or identification requirements
Physical location only—no online check cashing or digital service options mentioned
No customer reviews or ratings visible on the provided Waze listing
Check-cashing fees are typically 2-5% per transaction, higher than traditional bank accounts
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check access without account fees
Spanish-speaking community members who prefer bilingual financial service providers
Working professionals who cannot access traditional banks during standard 9-5 hours
Consumers needing wire transfers, money orders, or bill payment outside typical banking hours
diagnosis: Cely's Casa de Cambio is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers and working professionals who need immediate check access and transaction services outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that check-cashing fees (typically 2-5% per check) are significantly higher than maintaining a bank account, so this service should be used for immediate needs rather than as a long-term financial solution; customers must contact the business directly for specific pricing and requirements.
services: Currency exchange (implied by 'Casa de Cambio' name)
